verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Savior is waiting to enter your heart Why don't you let Him come in There's nothing in this world to keep you apart What is your answer to Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Time after time He has waited before And now He is waiting again To see if you're willing to open the door Oh how He wants to come in

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you'll take one step toward The Savior, my friend You'll find His arms open wide Receive Him, and all of your darkness will end Within your heart He'll abide

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh how He wants to come in
